Mix all ground meats well.  Use a Hobart mixer or similar industrial mixer to help.  Be careful not to overwork protien.
Add Egg and Cornstarch and mix well.
Incorporate the Wagyu Gyoza Seasoning and mix well.
Reserve to appropriate cambro containers and store in cooler until used to produce gyozas.
***NOTE: Wagyu should be cold ALWAYS.  Fat should never be rendering.
